creator: nickblack@linux.com
text:
Created attachment 227400
git diff 2.3.15 -> 2.3.17

https://github.com/dankamongmen/notcurses/releases/tag/v2.3.17

This fixes a major bug on non-Linux platforms (including FreeBSD) introduced in 2.3.15, which broke all frames larger than 2MiB. It also introduces awesome bitmap-based plots.
